footer.brandDescription: Personalized and magical stories to spark your children's imagination, generated by artificial intelligence.
footer.copyright: 2026 Mon Petit Conteur. All rights reserved.

home.title: Personalized stories for your children
home.heroSub: Create personalized tales in minutes where your child is the hero. Unique illustrations, educational themes, unforgettable adventures.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: A unique story in 5 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to illustrated tale, our magical assistant guides every step to create the perfect adventure.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Give a first name, choose the character type and skin tone.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose the language, the child's age and the number of chapters.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Soft & Magical, Disney/Pixar, Watercolor or Classic — your choice.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Courage, magic, friendship... Choose the tone: joyful, calm, adventurous.
howItWorks.step5Desc: AI generates a unique illustrated tale, ready to read in seconds.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything for a magical experience
features.subtitle: An app designed for parents and children, with features that make every story special.
features.aiDesc: Our artificial intelligence creates coherent, educational and captivating stories, adapted to your child's age and preferences.
features.stylesDesc: Choose between Soft & Magical (Japanese pastel), Disney/Pixar (vibrant 3D), Watercolor or Classic to illustrate each story.
features.multilingualDesc: Generate stories in French, English, Arabic, Japanese and many other languages for a truly personalized experience.
features.libraryDesc: All your created stories are saved in a beautiful library, ready to be re-read at any time.
features.storyTimeDesc: Set a daily reminder for story time. A soothing routine that prepares your child for sleep.
features.ageDesc: Vocabulary, narrative complexity and themes are automatically adjusted based on the child's age (3 to 12 years).

screenshots.label: The app
screenshots.title: Designed with love
screenshots.subtitle: A warm and intuitive interface, designed for parents and children alike.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple and transparent
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade to Premium whenever you want.
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for discovering the magic of personalized tales.
pricing.premiumDesc: Unlimited stories and all exclusive features.
pricing.managedByAppStore: Subscription managed via App Store. Cancel anytime.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Delighted families
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of families create magical stories every evening.
testimonials.t1Text: My 5-year-old son asks for a new story every night. The personalization is amazing — he recognizes his games and passions in the story!
testimonials.t2Text: The illustrations are magnificent! I chose the watercolor style and the images look like real quality children's books.
testimonials.t3Text: The story in Arabic for my daughter was perfect. She loved being the superheroine of the story. A truly unique app on the market.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Mon Petit Conteur.
faq.a1: Our stories are created using artificial intelligence specially trained to produce content suitable for children. Each story is unique, generated from your choices (name, theme, age, mood) to offer a truly personalized adventure.
faq.q2: Is the content suitable and safe for children?
faq.a2: Absolutely. All content is filtered and controlled to ensure it is appropriate, kind and educational. We do not tolerate any violent, scary or inappropriate content for children.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a3: Yes. The Premium subscription is managed directly by Apple's App Store. You can cancel it at any time from your iPhone Settings, at no additional cost. You keep access until the end of the paid period.
faq.q4: Are my data and my child's data protected?
faq.a4: Yes. We strictly comply with GDPR and only collect data necessary for the app to function. We never sell your data.
faq.a5: You can create stories in French, English, Arabic, Japanese, Spanish and other languages. We regularly add new languages based on community requests.
faq.q6: How long does it take to generate a story?
faq.a6: A complete story with illustrations is generated in seconds to minutes depending on your internet connection. You can track progress directly in the app.

cta.title: Create your first magical story
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of families who give their children a unique and personalized adventure every evening.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroSubtitle: A question, feedback or a problem? Our team is here to help.
contact.infoSubtitle: We respond to all requests related to the app, subscriptions, data privacy and feedback.
contact.responseTimeDesc: 24 to 48 business hours. We do our best to respond faster!
contact.errorBanner: Please correct the errors below before submitting.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request in detail. The more context you provide, the better we can help.
contact.privacyConsent: I agree that my data will be processed to respond to my request, in accordance with the
contact.privacyConsentError: You must accept the privacy policy.
contact.newsletter: I would like to receive Mon Petit Conteur news (updates, new features). You can unsubscribe at any time.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message. Our team will respond within 24 to 48 business hours. Please check your spam folder if you don't receive a response.
contact.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again later.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heroSubtitle: We take the protection of your data and your children's data very seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you control it.
privacy.summary: We only collect what is necessary for the app to function. We never sell your data. Your children's data is particularly protected and never used for advertising purposes.
privacy.s1P1: The data controller for personal data collected through the Mon Petit Conteur app is:
privacy.s1P2:
Mon Petit Conteur
[Company name / Developer name]
[Full postal address]
Email:
privacy.s2_1P: When creating an account, we collect:
privacy.s2_2P: To personalize stories, you provide us with:
privacy.s2_2Li1: Hero's first name (can be a fictitious name)
privacy.s2_2Warning: We advise against entering your child's real name or providing direct identifying information. You can use a nickname or a fictitious name.
privacy.s2_3Li1: Stories created and their parameters (theme, language, style)
privacy.s2_3Li2: App usage logs (pages visited, features used)
privacy.s2_3Li3: Performance and error data (anonymized crash reports)
privacy.s2_4P: Payments are processed exclusively by Apple via the App Store. We only receive subscription confirmation, without banking data.
privacy.s2_5Li2: Advertising identifier (IDFA) — only with your explicit consent
privacy.s3P1: Our app is intended for parents who create stories for their children. The app is not intended to be used directly by children under 13 without parental supervision.
privacy.s3Li1: We only collect the first name and age, solely for the purpose of personalizing the story
privacy.s3Li2: This data is never used for advertising, profiling or shared with third parties for commercial purposes
privacy.s3Li3: We comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and COPPA (Children's Online Privacy Protection Act)
privacy.s3Li4: Parents can request the deletion of all data associated with their child at any time
privacy.s3Info: Apple Compliance: Our app complies with Apple's guidelines for children's apps (section 1.3 of the App Store Review Guidelines).
privacy.s4P: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s4Li1: Service provision: Creation and storage of personalized stories (legal basis: contract performance)
privacy.s4Li2: Personalization: Adapting content to age and preferences (legal basis: contract performance)
privacy.s4Li3: Communication: Sending story time reminder notifications if enabled (legal basis: consent)
privacy.s4Li4: Service improvement: Anonymized usage analysis (legal basis: legitimate interest)
privacy.s4Li5: Security: Fraud detection and service integrity protection (legal basis: legitimate interest)
privacy.s4Li6: Legal obligations: Compliance with applicable legal obligations (legal basis: legal obligation)
privacy.s5P: We never sell your personal data. We only share it in the following cases:
privacy.s5_1Li1: Cloud hosting: Secure data storage (servers in Europe)
privacy.s5_1Li2: AI API: Story content generation (transmitted data is anonymized)
privacy.s5_2P: We may disclose information if required by law, particularly in response to a court order or a request from a competent authority.
privacy.s5Info: All our service providers are contractually bound to protect your data and only use it for the defined purposes.
privacy.s6Li1: Account data: Retained for the duration of the account, then deleted within 30 days of closure
privacy.s6Li2: Created stories: Retained as long as the account is active. You can delete them at any time.
privacy.s7P: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
privacy.s7Li3: Restricted data access to authorized personnel only
privacy.s7Li5: Data breach notification procedure (72 hours maximum)
privacy.s8P1: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.s8Li1: Right of access: Obtain a copy of your personal data
privacy.s8Li3: Right to erasure: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.s8Li4: Right to data portability: Receive your data in a structured format
privacy.s8Li5: Right to object: Object to the processing of your data for marketing purposes
privacy.s8Li6: Right to restriction: Request restriction of processing in certain circumstances
privacy.s8Li7: Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.s8P2: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacy.s8P3: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your national supervisory authority (in France: the
privacy.s9P1: The mobile app does not use cookies. Similar technologies (local storage) may be used to:
privacy.s9P2: This website (landing page) may use anonymized analytical cookies to measure audience. You can refuse them via your browser settings.
privacy.s10P: Your data is primarily hosted in Europe (EU/EEA). If transfers to third countries are necessary (e.g., certain AI services), they are governed by appropriate safeguards:
privacy.s10Li1: Standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission
privacy.s11P1: We may update this privacy policy. In case of significant changes, we will inform you by:
privacy.s11P2: The date of the last update is indicated at the top of this page. Your continued use of the app after notification constitutes acceptance of the changes.
privacy.s12P1: For any questions regarding your personal data or to exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO):

terms.title: Terms of Use & EULA
terms.heroSubtitle: By using Mon Petit Conteur, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.cguSummary: Mon Petit Conteur is reserved for adults acting on behalf of their children. Generated content is for personal and family use only. The subscription is managed by Apple.
terms.cgu1P1: By downloading, installing or using the Mon Petit Conteur app, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not accept these terms, you must stop using the app.
terms.cgu1P2: These Terms apply together with our
terms.cgu1P2End: and our End User License Agreement (EULA) accessible via the tab above.
terms.cgu1Warning: The app is reserved for persons 18 years or older. Minors may use the app under the direct supervision of a parent or legal guardian.
terms.cgu2P1: Mon Petit Conteur is a mobile app available on iOS that allows you to:
terms.cgu2Li1: Create personalized stories for children via artificial intelligence
terms.cgu2Li2: Choose customization parameters (hero, theme, language, visual style)
terms.cgu2Li3: Store and access a library of created stories
terms.cgu2P2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue all or part of the service with reasonable notice, except in emergencies.
terms.cgu3P1: To access the service, you must create an account by providing accurate and up-to-date information. You are responsible for:
terms.cgu3Li1: The confidentiality of your login credentials
terms.cgu3Li2: All activities carried out from your account
terms.cgu3Li3: Immediately notifying us of any unauthorized use
terms.cgu3P2: Only one account per person is allowed. Creating multiple accounts to bypass limitations is prohibited.
terms.cgu4_1P: The free plan includes the creation of 5 stories per month. Unused stories do not carry over to the following month.
terms.cgu4_2P: The Premium subscription is available at a monthly or annual rate. It provides access to unlimited stories and all advanced features.
terms.cgu4_3P: The subscription is entirely managed by Apple via the App Store. Billing, renewal and cancellation are done in accordance with Apple's terms. To cancel:
terms.cgu4_3Li3: Select Mon Petit Conteur and cancel the subscription
terms.cgu4_3P2: Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. No refund is granted for the period already paid, unless Apple decides otherwise in accordance with its policies.
terms.cgu4_4P: The subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
terms.cgu4_5P: We reserve the right to change prices with at least 30 days' notice. Changes apply to the renewal following the notification.
terms.cgu5_1P: Stories created from your parameters belong to you for personal and family use. Mon Petit Conteur retains a non-exclusive license to improve its services (in an anonymized manner).
terms.cgu5_2P: Although we make every effort to ensure the quality and relevance of generated stories, the content is produced by artificial intelligence and may contain imperfections. We do not guarantee that every story will be perfectly suited to your child.
terms.cgu5_3P: If a story contains content that seems inappropriate, you can report it via the built-in reporting feature or by contacting us at
terms.cgu6Li1: Use the app for commercial purposes without written authorization
terms.cgu6Li2: Attempt to circumvent technical or security limitations
terms.cgu6Li3: Scrape, extract or mass reproduce content
terms.cgu6Li4: Create violent, hateful, sexual or illegal content
terms.cgu6Li6: Share your credentials with third parties
terms.cgu6Li7: Use automated means to access the service
terms.cgu7P1: The app, its interface, logo, texts, and interface illustrations (excluding generated content) are protected by copyright and belong to Mon Petit Conteur.
terms.cgu7P2: You may not copy, modify, distribute or create derivative works from the app without prior written authorization.
terms.cgu8P: Mon Petit Conteur is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by applicable law:
terms.cgu8Li1: We do not guarantee continuous and uninterrupted availability of the service
terms.cgu8Li2: We are not liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of the app
terms.cgu8Li3: Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the subscription in the last 3 months
terms.cgu8Info: Some jurisdictions do not allow limitation of liability for certain types of damages. These limitations do not apply in such cases.
terms.cgu9P1: You can terminate your account at any time from the app settings or by contacting us. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of serious violation of these Terms.
terms.cgu9P2: In case of termination, your stories can be exported on request within 30 days of termination. After this period, they will be permanently deleted.
terms.cgu10P1: These Terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, an amicable solution will be sought first. Failing that, the competent courts of [City] will have exclusive jurisdiction.
